category_sources: Official README says git-big-picture visualizes Git repositories by reducing the DAG to expose tags and branches.
source_facts.description says it is a visualization tool for Git repositories.
display_name_sources: Official repository README heading uses git-big-picture.
docs_sources: Official GitHub repository README contains installation, git integration, usage, usage examples, configuration, and development sections.
Official repository includes a git-big-picture.1 man page.
repo_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official GitHub repository; official README installation also shows cloning https://github.com/git-big-picture/git-big-picture.git.
source_facts.repo is empty, so repo was researched.
tags_sources: Official README states it uses Graphviz, includes CLI usage, and lists Python and Graphviz dependencies.
